title: Bindings, Scope, Closures, and Lifetime · Language Lens: Loop Capture
summary: Build configurable counters and validators without leaking mutable state across community-service widgets. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js loop capture increment in a closure-backed state and validation library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Preserve per-iteration bindings in callbacks and asynchronous work without index drift.
Use closures to retain purposeful private state while recognizing capture and lifetime costs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
